name: [PDF] FIX Trading Specification for Equities
snippet: 40. OrdType char. Y. Order type. Values: 2 = Limit. 44. Price. Price. R. Price per share. Required for limit orders, OrdType (40) = 2 (Limit).

name: OrdType <40> field – FIX 4.4 – FIX Dictionary - OnixS
snippet: Order type. Valid values: 1 = Market 2 = Limit 3 = Stop 4 = Stop limit 5 = Market on close (No longer used) 6 = With or without 7 = Limit or better (Deprecated)
